name: hook contract: hook scripts receive a JSON envelope on stdin with hook_event_name, tool_name, tool_input
command: echo '{"hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","tool_name":"Edit","tool_input":{"file_path":"x.ts"}}' | bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/echo-input.sh" 2>out.json && grep -E '"hook_event_name":"PreToolUse"' out.json 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
